nasb.text: Even when the cloud lingered over the tabernacle for many days, the sons of Israel would keep the Lord’s charge and not set out.

esv.text: Even when the cloud continued over the tabernacle many days, the people of Israel kept the charge of the Lord and did not set out.

cnv.text: 如果雲彩多日停留在帳幕上，以色列人就遵守耶和華的吩咐，不起行。

ccb.text: 有时云彩在圣幕上停留多日，他们就遵照耶和华的吩咐安营多日。
